requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — NBSM NS Conformity and NEA Solar PV Grid-Connection
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——NBSM NS合格评定及NEA太阳能光伏并网
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——NBSM NS合格評定及NEA太陽能光伏併網

summary.en: Nepal's safety requirements for solar PV inverters are governed through NBSM (Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology) NS (Nepali Standard) certification, which adopts IEC standards. IEC 62109-1 (Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements) and IEC 62109-2 (Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters) are the applicable safety standards under Nepal's NS / IEC framework for PV inverters. NS certification from NBSM is required for regulated products at the import stage; inverters must demonstrate conformity with NS / IEC 62109-1/-2 safety requirements. NEA grid-connection technical conditions and AEPC programme quality standards both reference IEC 62109-based safety evidence for inverters. Third-party type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is the expected evidence format for NS conformity assessment and project owner procurement.
summary.zh: 尼泊尔太阳能光伏逆变器的安全要求通过NBSM（尼泊尔标准与计量局）NS（尼泊尔标准）认证管理，该认证采纳IEC标准。IEC 62109-1（光伏电力系统用功率变换器安全——第1部分：通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆变器特殊要求）是尼泊尔NS / IEC框架下光伏逆变器适用的安全标准。NBSM的NS认证在进口环节对受监管产品是必要的；逆变器须证明符合NS / IEC 62109-1/-2安全要求。NEA并网技术条件和AEPC计划质量标准均引用基于IEC 62109的逆变器安全证据。来自ILAC认可实验室的第三方型式试验证据是NS合格评定和项目业主采购的预期证据格式。
summary.zht: 尼泊爾太陽能光伏逆變器的安全要求通過NBSM（尼泊爾標準與計量局）NS（尼泊爾標準）認證管理，該認證採納IEC標準。IEC 62109-1（光伏電力系統用功率轉換器安全——第1部分：通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆變器特殊要求）是尼泊爾NS / IEC框架下光伏逆變器適用的安全標準。NBSM的NS認證在進口環節對受監管產品是必要的；逆變器須證明符合NS / IEC 62109-1/-2安全要求。NEA併網技術條件和AEPC計畫品質標準均引用基於IEC 62109的逆變器安全證據。來自ILAC認可實驗室的第三方型式試驗證據是NS合格評定和項目業主採購的預期證據格式。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters (adopted as NS via NBSM; required for NEA grid-connection and AEPC programme)
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements (parent standard; implicitly applicable as Part 2 cannot be assessed independently)
NBSM NS certification — Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology conformity assessment for regulated products at import

summary.en: China's primary voluntary standard for PV grid-connected inverter safety is GB/T 37408-2021 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which covers classification, environmental conditions, safety, electrical performance, EMC, and markings. GB/T 37408 is a China domestic standard assessed by CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. It shares conceptual safety intent with IEC 62109-1/-2 but is not harmonised with IEC 62109 and is not accepted by NBSM, NEA, or AEPC as equivalent to IEC 62109 type-test evidence. Chinese manufacturers exporting to Nepal must supplement GB/T 37408 certifications with IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports from ILAC-accredited laboratories to meet NS conformity requirements.
summary.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器安全的主要自愿性标准为GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术要求），涵盖分类、环境条件、安全、电气性能、EMC和标识。GB/T 37408是由中国CNAS认可实验室评估的中国国内标准。其安全意图与IEC 62109-1/-2在概念层面相近，但未与IEC 62109协调，不被NBSM、NEA或AEPC接受为IEC 62109型式试验证据的等效依据。出口至尼泊尔的中国制造商须以来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验报告补充GB/T 37408认证，以满足NS合格评定要求。
summary.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器安全的主要自願性標準為GB/T 37408-2021（光伏並網逆變器技術要求），涵蓋分類、環境條件、安全、電氣性能、EMC和標識。GB/T 37408是由中國CNAS認可實驗室評估的中國國內標準。其安全意圖與IEC 62109-1/-2在概念層面相近，但未與IEC 62109協調，不被NBSM、NEA或AEPC接受為IEC 62109型式試驗證據的等效依據。出口至尼泊爾的中國製造商須以來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗報告補充GB/T 37408認證，以滿足NS合格評定要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 safety certification does not satisfy Nepal NBSM NS / IEC 62109-2 conformity requirements for import or NEA grid-connection. Exporters must obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model or family being supplied to the Nepal project. Existing Chinese safety certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 must be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 test reports before submitting equipment documentation for NBSM NS certification, NEA grid-connection approval, or AEPC programme eligibility. Nepal imports significantly from China and India — NBSM routinely receives IEC-based evidence from Chinese manufacturers and expects it as the standard documentation basis.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408安全认证不满足尼泊尔NBSM NS / IEC 62109-2进口合格评定要求或NEA并网要求。出口商须从ILAC认可实验室取得涵盖供应至尼泊尔项目的特定逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书。仅依据GB/T 37408的现有中国安全证书，在提交NBSM NS认证、NEA并网审批或AEPC计划资格所需设备文件前，须补充IEC 62109-1/-2测试报告。尼泊尔从中国和印度进口量较大——NBSM定期收到中国制造商提供的基于IEC的证据，并将其作为标准文件基准。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408安全認證不滿足尼泊爾NBSM NS / IEC 62109-2進口合格評定要求或NEA併網要求。出口商須從ILAC認可實驗室取得涵蓋供應至尼泊爾項目的特定逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書。僅依據GB/T 37408的現有中國安全證書，在提交NBSM NS認證、NEA併網審批或AEPC計畫資格所需設備文件前，須補充IEC 62109-1/-2測試報告。尼泊爾從中國和印度進口量較大——NBSM定期收到中國製造商提供的基於IEC的證據，並將其作為標準文件基準。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for NBSM NS conformity at import for regulated product categories; required in practice for NEA grid-connection and AEPC programme equipment eligibility; IEC 62109-1/-2 is the applicable safety evidence standard
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408-2021 is a recommended national standard (GB/T designation); CQC/CGC voluntary certification available but not required under Chinese law

source.publisher: Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology (NBSM)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A solar PV inverter holding only Chinese GB/T 37408 certification cannot satisfy Nepal NBSM NS / IEC 62109 conformity requirements or NEA grid-connection safety evidence requirements. Plan for IEC 62109-1/-2 type testing by an ILAC-accredited laboratory before submitting equipment documentation for NBSM NS certification, NEA grid-connection approval, or AEPC programme eligibility in Nepal. Verify current NBSM NS standards adoption status and regulated product scope directly at nbsm.gov.np before committing to a test programme.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有中国GB/T 37408认证的太阳能光伏逆变器不能满足尼泊尔NBSM NS / IEC 62109合格评定要求或NEA并网安全证据要求。请在提交NBSM NS认证、NEA并网审批或尼泊尔AEPC计划资格所需设备文件前，安排ILAC认可实验室进行IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验。在启动测试计划前，请直接在nbsm.gov.np核实现行NBSM NS标准采纳状态和受监管产品范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有中國GB/T 37408認證的太陽能光伏逆變器不能滿足尼泊爾NBSM NS / IEC 62109合格評定要求或NEA併網安全證據要求。請在提交NBSM NS認證、NEA併網審批或尼泊爾AEPC計畫資格所需設備文件前，安排ILAC認可實驗室進行IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗。在啟動測試計畫前，請直接在nbsm.gov.np核實現行NBSM NS標準採納狀態和受監管產品範圍。
